data.epi_content:
As I entered the house, I noticed its structure—it looked like it would be cute and pretty once furnished.

While I was lost in admiring the interior, Evan began placing furniture with a slight flick of his finger.

"I was planning to decorate with the beautiful, luxurious pieces from the Imperial Palace. But should I use the rustic furniture from the Cabin where we used to live instead?"

I nodded.

At that, the room began filling with furnishings: a bed large enough for two people to embrace while sleeping, drawings I used to sketch when bored hanging on the walls, slightly rough but smoothly sanded wooden floors, and various cute drawers, bookshelves, and decorations filling the space.

"The Imperial Palace is, in a way, the place I hate most in the world."

Saying this, I glanced at a simple colored drawing on the wall and walked around the house with slightly exaggerated steps.

"It's all over now, but memories don't just disappear. And when you're trapped in useless memories like I am, you can't stand to look at anything related to them."

It's ridiculous, but there was no one here to point fingers at me.

"Well then, I guess we don't need these."

Saying this, Evan took out what appeared to be luxurious furniture from the Imperial Palace, trapped it in an air net, and began compressing it. He continued until it was crushed into a ball small enough to fit in his hand.

After reducing it to powder, Evan scattered it in front of the house and came back inside. He shrugged his shoulders, looking slightly embarrassed.

"I was using those when I was separated from you."

"I'm just being stubborn and a little spiteful. Don't worry about it too much."

I dragged over a chair made from wooden blocks I had collected—unbalanced and crude compared to what was in the Imperial Palace—and sat on it with my legs crossed. Then I took out a tobacco with chocolate and tea scents that I had been saving, wanting to smoke it before the atmosphere turned romantic. I bit it with my teeth, lit it, took a drag, exhaled, and approached Evan, whispering softly in his ear.

"This way, we'll probably be too awkward to talk properly for at least a day. Wouldn't you hate that?"

"I would."

"Then just come here and hold me lightly. My petty spite will be silenced with one simple action."

At those words, Evan embraced me and patted me gently. He hugged me so tightly that my body lifted off the ground. But Evan continued holding me up with no intention of putting me down.

"Hey, Evan. Could you put me down now?"

My left foot, which had been firmly attached, suddenly fell off. After looking at my foot on the floor, I turned my head forward to find Evan staring at me with slightly crazed eyes.

Feeling the romantic atmosphere for the first time in a while, I decided to surrender myself to Evan rather than avoid him. I'd been holding back for so long anyway.

But is this really romantic?

We'd pressed our faces together, occasionally mixed our lips, pressed our bodies together, and rubbed against each other in various ways, but we'd never stayed in one place, so we both put effort into controlling our emotions.

Evan, who had been holding back until now, still seemed to have that restraint in his body, as he just held me up without moving. So I pressed my body against him, embraced him with my arms, and whispered softly in his ear.

"Familiarity is best, but sometimes trying something new isn't so bad."

"You know what I'm talking about, right?"

"Yes. For example, having one child, no, two, and living with you in this mountain village would be so happy..."

My words couldn't continue to the end. We were too busy mixing our tongues.
data.epi_content2:
Evan began removing my clothes one by one. The scarf, thick coat, white frilled shirt, slightly worn white underwear, long skirt that was slightly tattered from tree branches, and then pushing aside the slightly damp underwear again, he continued mixing our tongues.

When the lack of air made my mind slightly hazy, I caressed his muscular back—covered with many scars—with my cold bare hands, and bit his ear slightly with my tea-scented mouth, whispering:

"Don't be too rough..."

Like a log dangling in mid-air, I asked him not to hurt me. But he held me like an object and began moving me up and down continuously. Like a masturbation tool.

"Hah, hng, ha..."

The sound of flesh hitting flesh could be faintly heard, but more than that, I was slightly annoyed at Evan for using me like an object.

I had imagined a romantic atmosphere, like young noble lovers on their wedding night experiencing some awkwardness as they came together. But this felt less like a loving collision and more like becoming an object receiving intense sexual desire.

Still, thinking that it was okay because it was Evan, I found myself annoyed again at the person before me, so I hugged him tightly and began clinging to him.

At first, I bit his neck slightly, then pressed my face against his and bit his ear lightly. I bit hard enough to leave red marks from my tiny teeth, but perhaps the pain stimulated his desire. The movement showed no sign of stopping.

"I'm not, hah, going anywhere... please slow down a bit... ah!"

In the end, I could barely control my head, but no matter how much I bit his ear with my white teeth, bit his neck, or chewed his shoulder, he had no intention of letting go. But judging by how the speed and intensity of his hip movements gradually increased, perhaps the moment was approaching.

"Erica, are you okay?"

"Hah, uh, yes."

With my answer, a warm sensation rose inside my body. It might be more accurate to say it was hot rather than warm.

After finishing, we lay down on the small bed, still connected. My legs were still convulsing, so I couldn't even think of separating.

Feeling some dryness and my body panting, I was relaxing my body and thinking about going to sleep when what was inside me started to grow large again.

"Evan, I'm tired."

"Bear with it today, Erica. I've been holding back for months."

When I tried to grumble and complain again, Evan silenced my mouth by moving his hips. Moving, moving, occasionally convulsing my waist and legs, spurting once, then moving again.

Yet Evan wasn't satisfied, and this terrible greedy man picked me up again and, like a child running around with a doll, carried me all around the house, thrusting hard.

...

Unable to keep up with Evan's stamina, I moaned for a long time before my eyes rolled back and I seemed to faint. When I opened my eyes, I was lying naked on the bed with my stomach slightly protruding. I moved my hand slightly to press the protruding part, but stopped when a warm sensation rose from below.

I tried to get up to put on clothes...

"Ugh."

But my waist felt like it would break, so I just lay back down. Looking at the ceiling, I let out a meaningless laugh and turned my head to look for Evan.

Evan was in the living room, neatly dressed, drinking a cup of tea while reading a book.

After I had fainted with my eyes rolled back, how much more had he thrust to make my lower abdomen hurt like this? He could have at least cleaned me up, but my whole body was covered in white and reeked of night flowers.

"Are you awake?"

Evan noticed me moving and spoke to me. I stared at him with a sulky face for a while, then feeling thirsty, asked Evan to bring me a glass of water.
data.epi_content3:
"Evan, please bring me some water."

When Evan looked at me as if I could go get it myself, I wanted to hit him for a moment, but I put my anger aside and spoke calmly.

"I can't move because you fucked me so roughly."

"Ah."

Only then did Evan take out a cup, create water in it, and feed it to me. It would have been nice if he had just fed me.

"Why are you touching my chest while giving me water?"

"Just, I was curious about how it felt since I was only holding you earlier."

"Put some tobacco in my mouth."

At those words, Evan put the tea-scented tobacco in my mouth and lit it for me.

"Next time, please be gentler."

"I'll try if possible."

"Ugh."

When I still couldn't move after some time had passed, Evan cleaned my body with a wet towel and began dressing me. It felt like being a doll, but I thought it might not be so bad to be Evan's doll.

I still felt something strange inside my belly, so I chuckled and joked with Evan.

"Looks like I won't need to stand on my head."

"What do you mean... oh."

"How much did you do to make me like this?"

"Well, I didn't really count after you collapsed."

I didn't answer and just looked at the ceiling.

"When the baby is born, will it love me?"

"Of course it will. What child wouldn't love a beautiful and wise mother?"

"If the child knew what I've done, would it hate me?"

"..."

"I wonder if it's okay for a twisted, ill-tempered, selfish, terrible murderer like me to have a child."

Strangely, tears began to flow. It was probably because my waist hurt so much because of Evan.

Evan silently approached me and calmly embraced me. Then he whispered to me, just like when he saved me that day.

"Everything will be fine. Don't worry unnecessarily, let's just think about the happy things to come."

Suddenly becoming depressed, I cried alone awkwardly. How embarrassing.

I lit the tobacco, inhaled the smoke, and exhaled. With joy instead of sadness.
